gold.rationale: 样本把来源不明的“发言体系人物/口径人物”传闻包装成“IRGC发言人遇袭身亡且伊朗已确认”的确定性事实，并用经过编辑的“Breaking新闻条”“时间地点戳”和伪造声明/资料卡来增强可信度；同时大量复用或错置旧事件画面（如大马士革使馆遇袭）来指代“德黑兰发言人遇袭”，导致图文在事件性质与发生语境上出现关键不一致，从而使读者获得的主要印象具有明显误导性。

visual_indicators.scene_description: A news broadcast still showing a man standing amidst the rubble of a destroyed building. The scene is hazy and chaotic, with a 'BREAKING NEWS' banner at the top and a caption at the bottom stating 'IRGC Spokesman Reported Killed' with a date of 'MAR 2026'.
visual_indicators.ocr_text: BREAKING NEWS | IRGC Spokesman Reported Killed | TEHRAN MAR 2026
visual_indicators.image_text_alignment_hint: The caption claims the IRGC spokesman was killed in March 2026, but the image shows a man standing on rubble which could be interpreted as a strike site.

visual_indicators.scene_description: A close-up of a damaged metal gate with a gold plaque attached. The plaque is for the 'Consular Section Of Embassy Of the I.R.I.RAN (Damascus)' and lists operating hours. The gate is broken, and rubble is visible behind it.
visual_indicators.ocr_text: كنسولي سفارت جمهورية اسلام ايران - دمشق | القنصلية التمثيلي في سفارة الجمهورية الإسلامية الإيرانية دمشق | Consular Section Of Embassy Of the I.R.I.RAN (Damascus) | 8:30 up 12:30 | Official Holiday: Fri & Sat
visual_indicators.image_text_alignment_hint: The image shows the damaged Iranian Embassy in Damascus, which the post text references as a historical event from April 2024, contrasting with the 'March 2026' date in the first image.

visual_indicators.scene_description: A screenshot of a social media post featuring a man shouting with a green and white scarf. The text below is in Farsi and includes an English caption stating 'IRGC confirms spokesperson killed in strike'.
visual_indicators.ocr_text: IRGC confirms spokesperson killed in strike
visual_indicators.image_text_alignment_hint: The English caption confirms the death of the IRGC spokesperson, aligning with the 'IRGC Spokesman Reported Killed' text in the first image.

visual_indicators.scene_description: An infographic card presenting a profile of 'Hassan Rezaei', identified as the 'Official Spokesman of IRGC'. It lists his age as 51 and a photo date of 'Oct 2023, Tehran'.
visual_indicators.ocr_text: IRGC SPOKESMAN | Name: Hassan Rezaei | Age: 51 | Role: Official Spokesman of IRGC | Date/Place: Oct 2023, Tehran
visible_overlays_annotations: Infographic background with Iranian flag elements
visual_indicators.image_text_alignment_hint: The image provides a profile of the IRGC Spokesman mentioned in the captions, but the date 'Oct 2023' contradicts the 'MAR 2026' date in the first image.

visual_indicators.scene_description: A grainy night photo showing a city skyline with a large plume of smoke or fire in the distance and a prominent cooling tower in the foreground.
visual_indicators.image_text_alignment_hint: The image depicts a scene of destruction or conflict, consistent with the theme of the post text regarding military strikes.

visual_indicators.scene_description: A press conference photo of a man speaking into multiple microphones. The microphones bear logos for ANA, LBC, and other news agencies.
visual_indicators.image_text_alignment_hint: The image shows a press conference, likely related to the IRGC spokesperson mentioned in the other images.

retrieved_evidence.text: 据叙利亚官方媒体和多国外交人士在 4 月上旬陆续披露，4 月 1 日前后，位于叙首都大马士革一处与伊朗驻叙使馆相关的建筑遭到空中打击，造成多名人员死亡和受伤。消息人士称，事发区域靠近使馆馆舍及外交人员活动场所，具体损失仍在进一步核实。随后，约旦等中东国家以及部分地区组织先后发表声明，对袭击表示谴责，并呼吁有关方面避免局势进一步升级。各方对行动的实施方式及责任方说法不一，相关调查尚未完全公开。
2024年伊朗驻叙利亚大使馆相关建筑在大马士革遭袭一事，被多方视为近期伊以冲突链条中的关键节点。据中东地区安全部门和外交渠道的说法，这次袭击导致使馆附属建筑严重受损、外立面被炸开、内部设施遭到破坏，也造成多名伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队人员身亡。相关报道常将这一事件作为理解伊朗对外安全战略和可能大规模报复行动的重要背景，显示伊朗在叙利亚战场上长期面临空袭与定点打击风险。
围绕“伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队发言人在冲突中被定点清除”的说法，社交平台上流传过多种版本的简短文字声明样式内容。此类内容往往模仿新闻客户端或官方账号排版，使用“革命卫队确认某发言人殉职”“将以大规模报复回应敌对行动”等表述，并配以伊以冲突相关新闻背景，以营造事件已获正式确认的印象。中东问题研究者指出，伊朗一旦公开证实高级军政人员被袭阵亡，往往会将其与对以色列或其盟友的报复威胁联系在一起。
围绕伊以冲突的舆论战中，各方媒体与社交账号频繁转发与伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队相关的象征性内容。据安全研究学者介绍，其中包括革命卫队军旗、礼兵列队、导弹发射演示以及举行悼念仪式的场合等，用以强调伊朗的军事能力与“复仇”的政治叙事。每当传出高级军官或发言人遭袭身亡的消息，相关象征符号通常会被再次大量使用，与“烈士”“报复”“升级战事”等关键词组合，强化伊朗可能采取大规模反击行动的印象。
伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队在近期伊以冲突不断升级的背景下再次成为外界关注焦点。有关报道中常以夜间城市街区、烟尘弥漫和部分受损建筑为背景，辅以“Tehran”等地名与具体时间标注，以突出所谓“伊朗革命卫队发言人遭定点清除身亡”的突发性质。根据中东问题观察人士介绍，围绕伊朗首都德黑兰的任何针对性袭击或暗杀传闻，往往被视为可能引发伊朗方面大规模报复和地区战事升级的敏感动向。

伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队层级复杂，其内设置发言人、指挥官及多种职务，外界对具体职位与头衔的认知常存在混淆。近期香港及中东媒体在转述有关“发言人遇袭身亡”的说法时，有时会引用某位伊朗军事人物的肖像制作为“人物资料卡”，标注姓名、年龄、隶属革命卫队及负责对外表态等信息，甚至附加“高级发言人”“对以作战总负责人”等夸大头衔。研究伊朗军政结构的学者指出，这类简单化的名片式信息容易忽略革命卫队内部职务的实际分工与权力层级。

#以色列空袭伊朗驻叙使馆事件时间线#【以色列空袭伊朗驻叙使馆致7人死亡，多国谴责】#多国谴责以色列空袭伊朗使馆致7死#据央视新闻报道 北京时间4月2日 5时30分

约旦等国谴责以色列袭击伊朗驻叙利亚使馆建筑

当地时间4月1日，约旦外交和侨务部发表声明，谴责以色列针对伊朗驻叙利亚大使馆领事处的袭 ​ ​​​
伊朗与以色列之间的对抗长期涵盖叙利亚、黎巴嫩以及波斯湾一带的多条战线，据地区分析机构介绍，伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队在境外部署顾问和武装伙伴网络，以支撑其“抵抗轴心”战略。一些报道在讨论近期所谓“发言人遭定点清除”时，会配以中东城市街区遭爆炸波及后的建筑损毁、医护人员在废墟间搜救以及居民在夜色中疏散的场面，以体现冲突对平民生活和城市基础设施的直接冲击，并提醒外界关注战事可能在更广范围内升级的风险。
伊朗导弹与无人机力量在伊以冲突叙事中被反复提及，被视为德黑兰进行报复和威慑的重要工具。军事观察家指出，伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队航空航天部队掌握多型中远程弹道导弹和巡航导弹，并在近年来多次展示集群无人机突防能力。每当出现有关革命卫队高级官员或发言人“遭定点清除身亡”的报道，坊间讨论通常会聚焦伊朗是否会动用精确打击能力对以色列或其地区盟友实施大规模报复，从而使战事跨越既有“红线”。
近年来，伊朗在国内多次举行大规模葬礼和悼念活动，悼念在境外行动中阵亡的伊斯兰革命卫队指挥员和成员。根据中东媒体的描绘，这类活动往往在德黑兰或牵涉人物的家乡举行，成千上万名民众在街道上齐声高呼反美、反以口号，革命卫队高级将领发表强硬讲话，誓言要通过军事打击“让敌人付出代价”。分析人士认为，一旦发生确实被伊朗确认的针对高阶人员的定点清除，这类大规模集会往往成为向外界传递“报复与升级”信号的重要舞台。
据伊朗及区域多国媒体援引军方消息人士近日报道，2026 年 2 月 28 日前后，美国与以色列对伊朗目标实施军事打击，伊朗方面随即进行回击。消息称，部分回击行动波及中东地区多处美军基地周边，引发外界对局势外溢风险的关注。联合国相关机构及多国外交部门随后呼吁各方保持克制，通过对话防止冲突进一步扩散。有分析指出，相关军事行动的具体规模与损失情况仍存在不同说法，需等待更多官方信息予以澄清。

【一夜过去，美以军事打击伊朗事态发展速览】美国和以色列2月28日军事打击伊朗，伊朗则对以色列予以回击，并用导弹袭击了美国驻中东地区的一些军事基地。冲突引发国际社会高度关注，多方敦促保持克制，避免紧张局势进一步升级，呼吁恢复对话。

一夜过去，截至北京时间早6点，美以军事打击伊朗事态发展 ​​​
【伊朗还能高强度作战至少半年？专家：影响战争长短和走向的因素有很多】#美伊以还会打多久#据红星新闻，伊朗专家会议8日发表声明，宣布推举已故最高领袖阿里·哈梅内伊之子穆杰塔巴·哈梅内伊为伊朗伊斯兰共和国新任最高领袖。伊朗方面消息称，在新任最高领袖的领导下，伊朗对以色列发动了第一波导弹攻 ​​​

德黑兰作为伊朗政治与安全中枢，其夜间安保状况常被用来反映国内警戒等级的变化。近期在伊以紧张局势加剧、传出伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队成员遭定点清除的背景下，有报道描述德黑兰部分主干道在夜间出现安全部队设卡、封锁道路的情形，救护车和警车警灯持续闪烁，执勤人员加强对过往车辆和人员的检查。根据当地居民与安全人士的说法，每当出现涉及高级军政人物的袭击或暗杀传闻，首都的警戒措施通常会阶段性升级，以防范进一步攻击或大规模骚乱。
据多名地区问题学者和安全分析人士近日在中东研究机构研讨会上介绍，关于当地近期伊以相关冲突的持续时间、强度变化以及可能演变方向，目前存在多种分析视角。一些观点强调军事行动节奏与各方国内政治考量，另一些则关注周边国家与地区武装组织的介入程度。受制于战场态势快速变化和公开信息有限等因素，专家普遍认为，影响局势走向的变量众多，短期内难以对冲突的具体时间表和发展高度作出明确判断。

text_analysis.alignment_reasoning: The post accurately reports the timeline and events of the Feb 2026 strike and the April 2024 Damascus attack, but it presents specific image evidence (IRGC Spokesman profile, Damascus embassy damage) as current visual proof of the Feb 2026 event, creating a temporal mismatch.
text_analysis.t3_evidence: The post presents images depicting the April 2024 Damascus embassy attack (Image 2: 'Consular Section Of Embassy Of the I.R.I.RAN (Damascus)', Image 1 caption 'IRGC Spokesman Reported Killed | TEHRAN MAR 2026' which contradicts the Damascus location) as visual evidence of the February 2026 strike described in the text, whereas Evidence [1] and [2] confirm the Damascus attack occurred in April 2024 and the Tehran death occurred in March 2026.
t3_problematic_subclaims: Image 2 showing the Damascus embassy gate is presented as evidence of the Feb 2026 Tehran strike.
Image 1 captioning the scene 'TEHRAN MAR 2026' is used to illustrate the Feb 2026 event while the scene depicts the April 2024 Damascus attack.
text_analysis.c1_evidence: Image 2 clearly depicts the 'Consular Section Of Embassy Of the I.R.I.RAN (Damascus)' and is presented in the text as visual evidence for the Feb 2026 strike, whereas the text itself correctly identifies the Damascus event as occurring in April 2024, creating a semantic mismatch between the image's temporal location and the text's claimed event.
c1_problematic_subclaims: Image 2 (Damascus embassy) is used to visually support the Feb 2026 Tehran strike narrative.
Image 1 (Tehran Mar 2026 caption) is used to support the Feb 2026 strike narrative despite depicting the April 2024 Damascus event.
text_analysis.global_assessment: The post is factually accurate regarding the timeline and events but misleadingly uses archival images from April 2024 and March 2026 to visually substantiate the February 2026 event, creating a temporal context error.

images.scene_description: A chaotic scene of rubble and debris with a person standing on a collapsed concrete structure, overlaid with a red 'BREAKING NEWS' banner and a lower-third caption reading 'IRGC Spokesman Reported Killed' and 'TEHRAN MAR 2026'.
images.ocr_text: BREAKING NEWS | IRGC Spokesman Reported Killed | TEHRAN MAR 2026
images.v2_evidence: The image features a large red 'BREAKING NEWS' banner and a lower-third caption with specific text overlays that are clearly added post-production, not part of the original scene.
images.c_evidence: The caption claims the event is in 'Tehran' and dated 'MAR 2026', but the ground truth evidence describes the scene as the 2024 Damascus embassy attack and the post text discusses a 2026 strike, creating a temporal and geographical mismatch.
images.explanation: The image is a composite news graphic with specific text overlays that contradict the ground truth evidence regarding the location (Tehran vs Damascus) and date (2026 vs 2024), indicating a mismatch in context.

images.scene_description: A close-up photo of a damaged metal gate with a golden plaque attached, showing Arabic and English text identifying it as the 'Consular Section Of Embassy Of the I.R.I.RAN (Damascus)'.
images.ocr_text: Consular Section Of Embassy Of the I.R.I.RAN (Damascus) | 领事馆 | 伊朗伊斯兰共和国大使馆 | Damascus
images.explanation: A clean, unedited photograph of the damaged Iranian Embassy in Damascus, consistent with the ground truth evidence.

images.scene_description: A screenshot of a social media post showing a man shouting with a flag, overlaid with Persian text and an English caption 'IRGC confirms spokesperson killed in strike'.
images.ocr_text: IRGC confirms spokesperson killed in strike
images.explanation: A screenshot of a social media post confirming the death of an IRGC spokesperson, consistent with the ground truth evidence.

images.scene_description: A digital graphic card titled 'IRGC SPOKESMAN' featuring a photo of a man, his name 'Hassan Rezaei', age '51', and role 'Official Spokesman of IRGC', with a date of 'Oct 2023, Tehran'.
images.ocr_text: IRGC SPOKESMAN | Name: Hassan Rezaei | Age: 51 | Role: Official Spokesman of IRGC | Date/Place: Oct 2023, Tehran
images.explanation: A composite graphic card summarizing information about the IRGC Spokesman, consistent with the ground truth evidence.

images.scene_description: A grainy night shot of a city skyline with a large industrial cooling tower, showing smoke or haze in the sky.
images.explanation: A candid night photo of a city scene with smoke, consistent with the ground truth evidence.

images.scene_description: A photo of a man with glasses and a beard speaking at a press conference with multiple microphones in front of him.
images.explanation: A standard press conference photo with a watermark, consistent with the ground truth evidence.

judge.level3_rationale: پست ادعا می‌کند که سخنگوی IRGC تأیید شده است، اما شواهد نشان می‌دهد که این گزارش هنوز تایید نشده و تصاویر حاوی خطاهای زمانی و سبک‌های خبر جعلی هستند که باعث سردرگمی مخاطب می‌شوند.
judge.reasoning_trace: The post text claims a March 2026 Tehran strike, but Image 2 shows the Damascus embassy (April 2024) and Image 4 shows a profile dated Oct 2023. This constitutes a classic 'image-from-different-event' scenario where real images are bound to a false context.
judge.core_claim: The post reports that an IRGC spokesman was killed in a strike on Feb 28, 2026, and uses a collage of images including the Damascus embassy attack (April 2024) and a profile of Hassan Rezaei (Oct 2023) to illustrate the conflict.
key_subclaims: IRGC Spokesman reported killed in March 2026 (Image 1 caption).
Image 2 shows the Consular Section of the Embassy of the I.R.I.RAN in Damascus.
Image 4 identifies the IRGC Spokesman as Hassan Rezaei, age 51, with a photo date of Oct 2023.
The post uses these images to support the narrative of the Feb 2026 strike.
The post mentions the April 2024 Damascus embassy attack as a background event.

subclaim_findings.subclaim: IRGC Spokesman reported killed in March 2026 (Image 1 caption).
subclaim_findings.note: Text mentions the event but specific date 'March 2026' is not explicitly confirmed in snippets; snippets mention Feb 2026 strike.

subclaim_findings.subclaim: Image 2 shows the Consular Section of the Embassy of the I.R.I.RAN in Damascus.
subclaim_findings.note: Image 2 clearly shows the plaque for the Damascus embassy.

subclaim_findings.subclaim: Image 4 identifies the IRGC Spokesman as Hassan Rezaei, age 51, with a photo date of Oct 2023.
subclaim_findings.note: Image 4 text explicitly states these details.

subclaim_findings.subclaim: The post uses these images to support the narrative of the Feb 2026 strike.
subclaim_findings.note: Image 2 (Damascus) and Image 4 (Oct 2023) are from different times and places than the Feb 2026 Tehran strike claimed in the text.

subclaim_findings.subclaim: The post mentions the April 2024 Damascus embassy attack as a background event.
subclaim_findings.note: Text explicitly references the April 2024 attack.

judge.verdict_reasoning: The post combines real images (Damascus embassy, Hassan Rezaei profile) with a fabricated or misframed narrative (March 2026 Tehran strike). The images are used to support a specific event (Feb 2026 Tehran strike) that they do not depict, creating a significant contextual mismatch. The use of the Damascus image to illustrate the Tehran strike is a clear case of image-from-different-event (T3/V2/C2).

image_findings.explanation: The image shows rubble consistent with the Damascus embassy attack (April 2024), but the caption claims 'TEHRAN MAR 2026', creating a contextual mismatch.
The image shows the Damascus embassy plaque, but the post uses it to illustrate the Feb 2026 Tehran strike, misplacing the location and time.
Image shows a social media post confirming the death, aligning with the text's claim.
The image identifies the spokesman as Hassan Rezaei from Oct 2023, which contradicts the 'March 2026' date in the main caption.
Night scene with smoke consistent with the general description of the Feb 2026 strike.
Press conference photo consistent with the description of military officials.
